user.title: LaCrosse JeeLink Bridge
user.description: Configure the serial connection to the JeeLink USB stick.

data_description.serial_port: Select the serial port of the JeeLink USB stick or enter it manually.
data_description.auto_add_entities: Automatically add new sensors when a packet is received for the first time.
data_description.outlier_confirm_count: How many times the same outlier value must be reported consecutively before it is accepted as valid (2–20). Prevents erroneous jumps from single faulty readings.

abort.already_configured: This serial port is already configured.

data.discovery_min_packets: Create new sensors after N packets (1 = immediately)

data_description.outlier_confirm_count: How many times the same outlier value must be reported consecutively before it is accepted as valid (2–20).
data_description.serial_timeout: Blocking read timeout on the serial port. Default 1 s — only change for troubleshooting.
data_description.reconnect_delay: How long to wait before reconnecting after a serial error (1–600 s).
data_description.battery_replace_timeout: How long the battery-replacement mode stays armed after pressing the button. Default 120 s.
data_description.debug_timeout: Debug logging switches itself off after this time. Default 300 s.
data_description.notify_enabled: Master switch for all notifications (connection lost/restored, new sensor discovered, battery low, battery replacement detected).
data_description.notify_entity: Target notify.* entity (Telegram, mobile app, …). Empty = no messages.
data_description.data_timeout: Warn when no radio packet has been parsed for this long even though the serial connection is up (silent firmware hang, antenna problem). A recovery message is sent when data resumes. 0 disables the watchdog.
data_description.stale_cleanup_hours: Automatically remove auto-discovered sensors that haven't sent data for this long — e.g. a neighbour's sensor that briefly reached your receiver. Only untouched sensors are removed: renaming the device or any entity, assigning an area, or adding labels protects a sensor permanently (it keeps its entities and battery-replaced button even with an empty battery).
data_description.discovery_min_packets: A brand-new sensor is only created after this many packets within the discovery window (like FHEM's autoCreateThreshold). Real IT+ sensors transmit every 4–8 seconds and pass within seconds; one-shot decode flukes and fringe receptions are never created. 1 = create at the first packet.
data_description.discovery_window_sec: Time window for the discovery threshold. Default 120 s.
data_description.init_commands: Space-separated commands sent to the sketch on every connect (like FHEM's initCommands). Default '7m 10t' = cycle all three data rates every 10 s. Example for a fixed rate: '0m' plus '17241r'.
